greatLocationDesc: 95% of recent guests gave the location a 5-star rating.
selfCheckInDesc: Check yourself in with the smart lock.
cancellationDesc: Cancel at least 48 hours before check-in for a full refund. Later cancellations may include deductions.
refundTerms: Refund terms shown before final confirmation
pricingNote: Final pricing is calculated at checkout for exact dates, selected room, discounts, and live tax rules.
noReviews: No reviews yet for this property.

review.writeDesc: Share your experience to help future guests.
review.noPropertyDesc: Open this page from a completed trip — the property link is set automatically.
review.publishedDesc: Your {{rating}}-star review of {{name}} has been submitted and is pending approval.
review.previewTitle: How the published card could read
review.previewDesc: Validate spacing and tone before submitting.
review.futureNote: Helpful votes, host replies, and moderation states can all extend from this review model later.
review.overallDesc: The strongest review flows feel composed, not overwhelming.
review.writtenDesc: Short fields keep this usable on mobile while still supporting a richer published review.
review.titlePlaceholder: e.g., Thoughtful, easy stay with great host communication
review.bodyPlaceholder: Describe what made your stay special…
review.highlightsDesc: Tags give the published card a stronger visual summary.

myReviews.title: Your review hub.
myReviews.desc: All the reviews you've submitted — track status, rating, and hotel responses.
myReviews.shareDesc: Visit a completed trip to leave a review for that property.
myReviews.shareHintPre: Open any trip from your bookings list and use the
myReviews.toneTitle: What strong guest reviews usually do
myReviews.toneDesc: A lightweight editorial guideline makes the review system feel intentional.
myReviews.tip1: Describe arrival, cleanliness, and host communication clearly.
myReviews.tip2: Call out what made the stay memorable or practical.
myReviews.tip3: Mention who the place is ideal for when that is obvious.
myReviews.publishedDesc: All reviews you've submitted, with their current moderation status.
